title: webdriverio@4.2.11 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.2.11.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.2.11
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As webdriverio is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 27 commits . - [`3f07d0f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/3f07d0f186ab15ff4d4c80efbae6a14e03812b1a) v4.2.11 - [`f8ee037`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/f8ee037c193f82e5ffd97b5f71f3885241026a05) bring back ejs template - [`15560bf`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/15560bf9a727fa1bbe120ebb14c6824e7f342a98) v4.2.10 - [`e579497`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/e57949744639877f20332d10ddd51ff9868f3df5) updated changelog - [`a163dd3`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/a163dd389bb3aa3fb84c7609c20fa1d48a0a41db) keep command files to generate doc page - [`f5c770e`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/f5c770eff13d715c0bdc4aa4575afadfc7a82f2d) v4.2.9 - [`d4b576f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/d4b576fa21395c6ad85ae99ddb003d168370afac) Update contributors - [`0f9cdd4`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/0f9cdd4572c8d01da8c23afd092ce1424f9edaa6) minor last doc tweaks - [`edb6cca`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/edb6cca113d7c7663e4911e3b789c2fc98566f20) minor last doc tweaks - [`969faf7`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/969faf76262863e35c06333ca305e46f2d57695e) updated changelog - [`efc95d5`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/efc95d53a327095015561db059c85e060598e6ba) annotate addCommand method [ci skip] - [`89c6867`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/89c68679580603fe7938e47c880812b2b314949f) keep docs in npm package - [`b755b83`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/b755b83095c3b703622845d97d9e16cad56524a0) added additional services to cli tool - [`acc7ba3`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/acc7ba3d85344792b889fe17579fbd8eae232ffc) added concise reporter to the docs - [`f6fa331`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/f6fa331eaf1a9018c402b06b3b27e0606b6930d7) add video to debug docs page There are 27 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/4147f8b01fec98e35d057b67ee88428c04e7e4d0...3f07d0f186ab15ff4d4c80efbae6a14e03812b1a). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
